repeat from step 2 until each opponent has lost the game.

archetypes.label: Punisher
archetypes.hint: Rampaging Ferocidon and Roiling Vortex punish the pod while shutting off life gain (10 pieces, 59% of deck salt).

archetypes.label: Reset Button
archetypes.hint: Blasphemous Act anchors 4 board resets (30% of deck salt).

archetypes.label: Wallet Flex
archetypes.hint: Deflecting Swat anchors 8 premium-priced picks (6% of deck salt).

archetypes.label: Life Lock
archetypes.hint: Rampaging Ferocidon and Roiling Vortex turn off life gain (2 pieces, 6% of deck salt).
